activities_projects.title: Regional Language Map
activities_projects.objective: Understand the development of regional languages in India
steps: Take a blank map of India
Mark regions where languages like Bengali, Tamil, Kannada, and Marathi developed
Write one important literary work from each region
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand how regional languages developed in different parts of India

activities_projects.title: Folk Tale Collection
activities_projects.objective: Explore regional stories and cultural traditions
steps: Find one folk tale from any region of India
Write a short summary of the story
Share the story with the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn about regional storytelling traditions

activities_projects.title: Mini Biography of a Poet
steps: Choose a poet like Kabir, Mirabai, or Chaitanya
Write a short biography
Mention their contributions to regional culture
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the role of poets in shaping culture
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of information and clarity (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Temple Architecture Drawing
steps: Look at pictures of temples from different regions
Draw one temple style
Label important parts of the structure
activities_projects.evaluation: Drawing neatness and correct labeling (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Music and Dance Research
steps: Choose a regional dance or music form
Write where it originated
Explain its cultural importance
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the diversity of Indian cultural traditions

activities_projects.title: Bhakti Movement Chart
activities_projects.objective: Understand the role of the Bhakti movement in regional cultures
steps: List important Bhakti saints
Write their teachings
Show how they influenced regional culture
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the influence of Bhakti saints on society

activities_projects.title: Regional Food Culture Survey
activities_projects.objective: Explore how culture influences food habits
steps: Ask family or friends about traditional foods from different regions
Write down at least five examples
Explain how geography or culture influences them
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students connect regional culture with food traditions

activities_projects.title: Traditional Dress Presentation
steps: Collect images of traditional clothing from different regions
Describe the clothing style
Explain why it suits the local climate and culture
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the connection between culture, climate, and clothing

activities_projects.title: Regional Culture Quiz
steps: Prepare 10 questions about regional culture
Conduct a quiz in groups
Keep score for correct answers
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students recall and apply concepts from the chapter
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of questions and participation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Culture Collage
steps: Collect pictures related to regional festivals, dances, temples, and literature
Arrange them on a chart paper
Label each picture with its region
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students appreciate the richness and diversity of regional cultures
